name: saucedemo-playwright
description: End-to-end test suite for https://www.saucedemo.com using Playwright: UI/functional, visual regression, network (XHR), accessibility, performance, and security testing across desktop engines, branded channels, and emulated devices.

scripts.test:ui: playwright test tests/ui && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:visual: playwright test tests/visual && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:network: playwright test tests/network && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:a11y: playwright test tests/a11y && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:perf: playwright test tests/performance && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:security: playwright test tests/security && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:branded: INCLUDE_BRANDED=1 playwright test --project=edge --project=google-chrome && npm run allure:generate
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
